---
title: Tips on automationg using Metadata
model: 3
figures:
    npde: 
       pred: 
          path: "./cwres-npde-pred"
          cap: "Residual Plots versus population prediction" 
       tad:  
          path: "./cwres-npde-tad" 
          cap: "Residual Plots versus time after dose"
params:
    fig_path: "this/is/figure/path" 
    npde_pred: ./cwres-npde-pred.png
---


This is figure path {{< meta params.fig_path >}}

```{r}
x <- params$fig_path
print(x)
getwd()
```

![{{< meta figures.npde.pred.cap >}}]({{< meta figures.npde.pred.path >}})

![{{< meta figures.npde.tad.cap >}}]({{< meta figures.npde.tad.path >}})
